title: Victor Ruiz
html:
Victor Ruiz

Stub. Victor Ruiz appears in the Feb 20, 2026 "Fallen" memorial list. Strong candidate identity for "Vic" — the deceased friend grieved by David in the Jan 4, 2024 dad in bad state late night cry note.

Open questions

  • Confirm whether Victor Ruiz === Vic from the Jan 2024 note.
  • Cause and date of death.
